## What were you trying to do?

A clear description of what you were trying to build or follow.

## What happened instead?

What you saw, including any error messages.

## Which project?

For example, Project 02 (Account Auto-Numbering Plug-in).

## Environment

- Power Platform region:
- Browser:
- Visual Studio version (if relevant):
- Anything else worth knowing:

## Screenshots

Drag any screenshots into this issue if they help.
